LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER THEODORE GLENWRIGHT'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS DENIED. THE DEPARTMENT DID NOT ABUSE ITS DISCRETION. VEHICLE CODE 13353.3(B)(1) DOES NOT APPLY TO PETITIONER. THE CONTROLLING STATUTE IS VEHICLE CODE 13353.3(B)(2)(A) AND THEREFORE, THE ONE YEAR SUSPENSION WAS PROPER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185. =(302/LCN)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Sep-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney Jay Y. Bank, Law Offices of Majeed S. Samara, 650.588.7700, for the Petitioner.
Attorney John T. McGlothin, Office of the Attornery General - DOJ, 510.622.2224, for the Respondent.

No argument held. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER THEODORE GLENWRIGHT'S Notice Of Motion And Petition For Writ Of Mandate is Denied. The department did not abuse its discretion. Vehicle Code 13353.3(b)(1) does not apply to petitioner. The controlling statute is Vehicle Code 13353.3(b)(2)(A) and therefore, the one year suspension was proper. Order signed in open court. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185. =(302/LCN)

Notice Of Motion And Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Sep-12-2013 Continued To Sep-27-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JAY Y. BAIK OF THE LAW OFFICES OF MAJEED S. SAMARA, TEL. NO.
(650) 588-7700 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER THEODORE GLENWRIGHT's Petition For Writ Of Mandate is continued to September 27, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The Court does not have copies of the moving papers. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers and a copy of the petition to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than September 12, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
